Description: Amazon Toys & Games product network. Nodes are toy products with text and image modalities and edges represent product associations such as co-purchase or similarity.
Amazon product graph containing movie-related items. Each node represents a movie product with textual descriptions and product images; edges capture relationships between products.
Small-scale version of the Amazon Grocery dataset. Contains grocery products represented by textual and visual features used for multimodal graph clustering evaluation.
Large-scale Amazon Grocery product graph. Nodes correspond to grocery items with multimodal attributes (text and images) providing a challenging benchmark for scalable clustering.
Small-scale graph derived from the RedCaps dataset. Nodes correspond to Reddit posts/images with associated captions represented through text and image embeddings
Large-scale version of the RedCaps-based multimodal graph. Contains Reddit image-caption pairs connected through graph relationships and categorized into multiple classes.
Amazon product graph from the Photo category. Each node represents a photography-related product described by both textual content and product images.
Amazon Arts Crafts & Sewing product graph. Nodes are arts-and-crafts products with multimodal attributes (text and images) connected through product relationships.
